title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Warangal
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
